languages.text: {n}Техножречество всегда оставалось малопонятной простому человеку кастой, так что сложно сказать, что творится в сердце посвятившего себя Богу-Машине, когда он ступает по документу, подписанному Богом-Императором, провозглашенным Марсом Омниссией.{/n}

{n}The Tech-Priest caste has ever been poorly understood by ordinary folk, so it is difficult to discern the workings of the heart of one dedicated to serving the Machine God — especially when that servant is treading on a document signed by the God-Emperor, proclaimed as the Omnissiah by Mars itself.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Техножречество всегда оставалось малопонятной простому человеку кастой, так что сложно сказать, что творится в сердце посвятившего себя Богу-Машине, когда он ступает по документу, подписанному Богом-Императором, провозглашенным Марсом Омниссией.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Tech-Priest caste has ever been poorly understood by ordinary folk, so it is difficult to discern the workings of the heart of one dedicated to serving the Machine God — especially when that servant is treading on a document signed by the God-Emperor, proclaimed as the Omnissiah by Mars itself.{/n}

{n}The Tech-Priest caste has ever been poorly understood by ordinary folk, so it is difficult to discern the workings of the heart of one dedicated to serving the Machine God — especially when that servant is treading on a document signed by the God-Emperor, proclaimed as the Omnissiah by Mars itself.{/n}

{n}The Tech-Priest caste has ever been poorly understood by ordinary folk, so it is difficult to discern the workings of the heart of one dedicated to serving the Machine God — especially when that servant is treading on a document signed by the God-Emperor, proclaimed as the Omnissiah by Mars itself.{/n}

languages.text: {n}テクプリストの階級は、一般の人々には理解されにくい存在でした。機械神に仕える者たちの心の動きを理解するのは難しいでしょう。特に、その者が神帝の署名した文書を踏んでいる時です。火星はそれをオムニシアスと宣言したのです。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest caste has ever been poorly understood by ordinary folk, so it is difficult to discern the workings of the heart of one dedicated to serving the Machine God — especially when that servant is treading on a document signed by the God-Emperor, proclaimed as the Omnissiah by Mars itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}テクプリストの階級は、一般の人々には理解されにくい存在でした。機械神に仕える者たちの心の動きを理解するのは難しいでしょう。特に、その者が神帝の署名した文書を踏んでいる時です。火星はそれをオムニシアスと宣言したのです。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La casta de tecnosacerdotes nunca ha sido bien comprendida por el resto de la gente, así que es difícil entender cómo funciona el corazón de alguien que sirve al Dios Máquina, especialmente cuando dicho sirviente está pisando un documento firmado por el Dios Emperador, nombrado Omnissiah por el propio Marte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest caste has ever been poorly understood by ordinary folk, so it is difficult to discern the workings of the heart of one dedicated to serving the Machine God — especially when that servant is treading on a document signed by the God-Emperor, proclaimed as the Omnissiah by Mars itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La casta de tecnosacerdotes nunca ha sido bien comprendida por el resto de la gente, así que es difícil entender cómo funciona el corazón de alguien que sirve al Dios Máquina, especialmente cuando dicho sirviente está pisando un documento firmado por el Dios Emperador, nombrado Omnissiah por el propio Marte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Kaste der Techpriester wird vom gemeinen Volk seit jeher falsch verstanden, insofern ist es schwierig, einem Diener des Maschinengottes ins Herz zu blicken ... vor allem, wenn besagter Diener auf einem vom Gottimperator unterzeichneten Dokument herumtrampelt{/n}.
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest caste has ever been poorly understood by ordinary folk, so it is difficult to discern the workings of the heart of one dedicated to serving the Machine God — especially when that servant is treading on a document signed by the God-Emperor, proclaimed as the Omnissiah by Mars itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Kaste der Techpriester wird vom gemeinen Volk seit jeher falsch verstanden, insofern ist es schwierig, einem Diener des Maschinengottes ins Herz zu blicken ... vor allem, wenn besagter Diener auf einem vom Gottimperator unterzeichneten Dokument herumtrampelt{/n}.

languages.text: {n}Les gens ordinaires ont toujours eu de grandes difficultés à comprendre la caste des technoprêtres, il est donc compliqué de saisir les subtilités du fonctionnement du cœur d'un serviteur du Dieu-Machine... surtout lorsque celui-ci est en train de fouler un document signé de la main de l'Empereur-Dieu, reconnu comme étant l'Omnimessie par Mars Lui-même.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest caste has ever been poorly understood by ordinary folk, so it is difficult to discern the workings of the heart of one dedicated to serving the Machine God — especially when that servant is treading on a document signed by the God-Emperor, proclaimed as the Omnissiah by Mars itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les gens ordinaires ont toujours eu de grandes difficultés à comprendre la caste des technoprêtres, il est donc compliqué de saisir les subtilités du fonctionnement du cœur d'un serviteur du Dieu-Machine... surtout lorsque celui-ci est en train de fouler un document signé de la main de l'Empereur-Dieu, reconnu comme étant l'Omnimessie par Mars Lui-même.{/n}

languages.text: {n}技术神甫阶层向来难以被凡俗之人所理解。因此，想要洞悉一位侍奉万机之神者的内心运作尤为困难，尤其是当这位仆从践踏着的文件，正是由神皇——被火星尊为欧姆尼赛亚之人——亲笔签署的。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest caste has ever been poorly understood by ordinary folk, so it is difficult to discern the workings of the heart of one dedicated to serving the Machine God — especially when that servant is treading on a document signed by the God-Emperor, proclaimed as the Omnissiah by Mars itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}技术神甫阶层向来难以被凡俗之人所理解。因此，想要洞悉一位侍奉万机之神者的内心运作尤为困难，尤其是当这位仆从践踏着的文件，正是由神皇——被火星尊为欧姆尼赛亚之人——亲笔签署的。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip kastı, sıradan halk tarafından her zaman yanlış anlaşılmıştır. Bu yüzden Makine Tanrı'ya hizmet etmeye adanmış birinin kalbinin işleyişini ayırt etmek zordur... Özellikle de o hizmetkâr, Mars'ın bizzat Hermesih ilan ettiği Tanrı İmparator tarafından imzalanmış bir belgenin üzerinde yürürken.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest caste has ever been poorly understood by ordinary folk, so it is difficult to discern the workings of the heart of one dedicated to serving the Machine God — especially when that servant is treading on a document signed by the God-Emperor, proclaimed as the Omnissiah by Mars itself.{/n}
